title: Feedback - send a Other feedback with names/email
scenario: "Other" feedback sent from App Settings > Feedback does not include user's name and email
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
Tap the menu icon (hamburger or gear) to navigate to App Settings.
In App Settings, tap on Feedback.
On the Feedback screen, select the "Other" option.
Enter feedback text in the provided text field.
Enter the user's name in the Name field.
Enter the user's email address in the Email field.
Tap the Send button to submit the feedback.
expected: Feedback is sent successfully with the user's name and email attached.
